rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY VERMILLION VS. MARGARITA MORENO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Determining Good Faith Of Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 27, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANTS CESAR CONTRERAS and PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL, INC.'S Motion For Order Determining Good Faith Of Settlement GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWIN KEITH STEPHENS et al VS. CAL-WESTERN RECONVEYANCE CORP. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 27, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., SUCCESSOR BY MERGER WITH DEMURRER'S TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurer to the 1st cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Homeowner's Bill of Rights is not applicable. Demurer to the 3rd cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Rosenthal Act is not applicable. Demurer to fraud cause of action is overruled.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GREG BURGHART VS. DANIEL O'NEILL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Daniel O'Neill, Cindy O'Neill'S Motion For Protective Order To Limit Discovery Et Al.
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 27, 2014, line 8. Defendants Daniel O'Neill, Cindy O'Neill'S Motion For Protective Order To Limit Discovery Et Al. Hearing required. = (501/REQ) LATE TENTATIVE

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS C.R. TAM VS. THOMAS W. TAM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 27, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT THOMAS W. TAM'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Grounds for Motion to strike do not appear on the face of the complaint. Motion to Strike filed 3 days after Answer. Request for Judicial Notice is DENIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OLD REPUBLIC NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. DAVID W. BLANZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 27, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANTS DAVID BLANZ and KAREN BLANZ'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to April 23, 2014. Parties are to provide supplemental briefing no later than April 11, 2014 regarding availability of declaratory relief under the facts of these case. Cases cited in the moving and opposition papers are distinguishable. Supplemental briefing shall not exceed 5 pages, excluding exhibits, if any. = (501/REQ) LATE TENTATIVE

rulings.Case Title: ANA EDITH CONTRERAS et al VS. D'ANDRE WHITE
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-537088 WITH CASE CGC-14-536869
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 27, 2014, line 5. PLAINTIFF ANA CONTRERAS' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-537088 WITH CASE CGC-14-536869 GRANTED. Language "This matter shall not be tried in a probate court proceeding" is excluded from the Order. = (501/REQ) LATE TENTATIVE

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTY STYER VS. DAVID JAH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 27, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT DAVID JAH'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). Defendant's ex-parte application was filed at 3:55 p.m. on the last day to answer. First paragraph provided that ex-parte was set for March 5, 2014 at unspecified time in unspecified department. No proper declaration regarding notice to the other side was provided. Ex-parte application was untimely to obtain the relief sought and procedurally improper. = (501/REQ) LATE TENTATIVE

rulings.Case Title: MARK WANNAVIROJ et al VS. ALEKSANDR RABINOVICH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Costs Or In The Alternative Motion To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 27, 2014, line 7. PLAINTIFFS MARK WANNAVIROJ AND VENA SHOTIVEYERATANA'S Motion To Strike Costs Or In The Alternative Motion To Tax Costs DENIED, subject to (1) Defendant presenting invoice/proof of payment for services of Drew Soto. = (501/REQ) LATE TENTATIVE
